person.name: Mehmet
person.title: AI Native Engineer
person.about: I am a stack agnostic product engineer with experience in various programming languages and technologies. I am a quick learner and always looking for new challenges and opportunities to grow.

experiences.title: Founder
experiences.description: We design and develop various projects for clients from different backgrounds. Also, we approve due diligence for current projects and help companies adapt new AI technologies. We educate their employees on new workflows and guide them on how to integrate AI tools into their daily operations.

experiences.title: Software Eng
experiences.description: I developed an emailing service and a handshaking service to monitor the performance of individual services, ensuring that all cronjobs were executed successfully. It can monitore errors and provide support for non-idempotent services. This monitoring process, previously conducted by sysadmins for over 20 services, was automated through the use of my service, which also generated daily reports through email. Additionally, I created a news monitoring service that scrapes news from various sources, such as IRS, HKEX, and Clearstream, and emails them to analysts. I integrated a machine learning model to predict news topics and improve analysts' productivity. I also developed a government bonds monitoring service. I assisted and mentored junior developers in their integration to the company and in improving their technical skills, and participated in code reviews for junior-mid level developers. I also made deployments of web services and scripts to remote Linux VPS using Docker-Compose.

experiences.title: Software Eng
experiences.description: I was involved in telecom data analysis and machine learning projects, during which I deployed models using Python and Django. Unfortunately, I am unable to provide further information due to confidentiality agreements.

experiences.title: Software Eng
experiences.description: Development of SAP Commerce (Hybris) using Java and Spring, following agile methodologies. This project involved the creation of an e-commerce platform for Penti, an international woman's clothing company with over 400 stores. During my time on this project, I was responsible for the development and implementation of various features, including favorites, store search and pick-up, customer consents, and others. These features aimed to improve the user experience and enhance the functionality of the platform. Overall, my work on this project allowed me to hone my skills in Java, Spring, and agile methodologies, and contributed to the success of the Penti e-commerce platform.

experiences.title: Tutor
experiences.description: During my time at university, I had the opportunity to tutor programming to students aged 13-19. This experience allowed me to develop my teaching skills and strengthen my ability to explain complex concepts in an easily understandable manner. I believe that this experience is valuable in my professional career as it allows me to assist and guide my colleagues in improving their technical skills. The students I taught were located in Germany, Switzerland, the Netherlands, and Turkey, and the lessons were conducted entirely online in English. The topics covered included object-oriented programming, Java, Python, C#, JS, HTML, and CSS.

projects.name: Ödedimmi Mobile and Web App Flutter 2025
projects.description: The app got 110K+ users and 30K$+ revenue since its launch in early December 2025 and is still growing. A Flutter web and mobile app for tracking expenses and income with synchronized multi account and member support. Fully built with Flutter and Firebase with an intern I worked with. https://www.odedimmi.com

projects.name: Safe Zones Camera App SwiftUI 2025
projects.description: I developed a safe zones camera app using SwiftUI and the SwiftUI framework. The app allows users to create templates with safe zones and take photos or videos by overlaying a safe zone on the screen and a teleprompter. https://apps.apple.com/tr/app/teleprompt-safe-zones/id6742501764

projects.name: Construction AI Estimation App SwiftUI 2024
projects.description: The app got 10K+ downloads, 15K$+ revenue and 4.6 stars on the Apple App Store. I developed a contractor estimation app using SwiftUI and the SwiftUI framework. The app allows users to estimate the cost of a project by entering the details of the project. The app uses the OpenAI API with a custom fine-tuned model I trained myself to generate a cost estimate based on the details of the project. https://apps.apple.com/tr/app/ai-cost-estimates-4-contractor/id6740389403

projects.name: Paytodo Budgeting App SwiftUI 2023
projects.description: The app got 50K+ downloads, 40K$+ revenue and 4.7 stars on the Apple App Store. I developed a budgeting app using SwiftUI and the SwiftUI framework. The app allows users to track their income and expenses and create budgets. https://apps.apple.com/tr/app/income-expense-planner-paytodo/id6460931601

projects.name: AI Chatbot App SwiftUI 2023
projects.description: It was still in the early days of ChatGPT API and official ChatGPT app was not yet released. This was my attempt to build a chatbot using the OpenAI API. This app was published on the Apple App Store but I removed it from the store due to inactivity.

projects.name: ConvoUp Mobile App Flutter 2023
projects.description: Back in the days ChatGPT API was just released and this was an experiment app to see how it works. The app generating conversation starter questions based on the user's interests. Used AWS lambda for hosting This app was published on the Apple App Store but I removed it from the store due to inactivity.

projects.name: Tutdu Mobile App Flutter 2022
projects.description: An app for improving productivity and focus. Back in the days pomodoro technique was not popular yet and this was basically one of the first examples to implement it. This app was published on the Apple App Store but I removed it from the store due to inactivity.

projects.name: Resume Maker Python Package 2022
projects.description: I was frustrated with the various resume building tools and Word documents that I had tried, and I decided to create my own Python package that allows users to build a resume simply by providing a JSON file. This project allowed me to gain a deeper understanding of how Python packages work and how to share packages on PyPI. This resume was also built using this package, which I found to be an interesting and fulfilling process. Link: https://pypi.org/project/resume-maker/

projects.name: Crypto Trading Bot 2021
projects.description: For this project, I developed a cryptocurrency trading bot with python that implemented my own trading strategy. Initial testing showed promising results, with daily profits ranging from 0.5% to 1.5% for various coins including BNB, ADA, BTC, ETH, LINK, and LTC. However, the market crash subsequently rendered the trading strategy ineffective.
